applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Scalar base raised elementwise to a tensor exponent: out = scalar ** x. Maps to ttnn.rpow(x, scalar). Taken directly from registered golden _golden_function_rpow.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.rpow(input_tensor, {EXPONENT_SCALAR}); constraints: {'scalar_range_tested': [0.5, 10.0], 'input_value_range_tested': [-30, 30], 'accuracy': 'ULP<=8 overall; ULP<=1 for exponents < 5; PCC >= 0.99'}; fusion_notes: Unary scalar-base power; fusable into eltwise unary chains (e.g. exp(x*log(scalar)) decompositions can be replaced by a single rpow).
